entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for transpiration efficiency variations.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The biomass produced per unit of water transpired, a key trait for crop performance under limited water.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand water scarcity, which can be increased by improving transpiration efficiency.

entities.name: PMIGAP
entities.description: A large and representative reference collection of pearl millet genotypes used for diversity analysis.

entities.name: LYSIMETER TRIALS
entities.description: Experimental trials used to assess transpiration efficiency under various water conditions.

entities.name: LIMITED WATER
entities.description: A state of water scarcity that affects crop performance.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition where water availability is insufficient for the plant.

entities.name: WELL-WATERED
entities.description: A condition where water is provided sufficiently to the plant.

entities.name: TERMINAL-WATER STRESS
entities.description: Water stress occurring at the end of the growth cycle.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the crop.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass, a primary contributor to grain yield.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT (GXE) INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental conditions affecting trait expression.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of variation in a trait that is due to genetic factors.

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Different environmental regions for which hybrids are bred.

entities.name: PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to produce different phenotypes in different environments, related to GxE interaction.

relationships.description: PEARL MILLET exhibits variations in TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
Increasing TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY contributes to increased DROUGHT TOLERANCE
TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY is a key trait for crop performance under LIMITED WATER
PMIGAP is a reference collection of PEARL MILLET genotypes
LYSIMETER TRIALS were used to assess TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
LYSIMETER TRIALS assessed TE under WATER STRESS conditions
LYSIMETER TRIALS assessed TE under WELL-WATERED conditions
TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY is a contributor to GRAIN YIELD
HARVEST INDEX is a primary contributor to GRAIN YIELD
Environmental conditions triggered GxE interactions for TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY differed among hybrids developed for different AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
PLASTICITY is the manifestation of the GxE interaction
